worker_caveat: RCH worker affinity changed after the focused proof test. The evidence keeps the worker IDs explicit; deltas exceed the profiling skill's >20% escalation/noise envelope.

target_hotspot.profile_reason: Top measured fj-trace benchmark. Each primitive record in this chain stored one/two input tracer ids and one output tracer id in heap Vec buffers inside TraceEquation.

lever: Store TraceEquation input/output tracer id lists in SmallVec inline buffers instead of Vec heap buffers.

isomorphism_proof.ordering_preserved: Yes. SmallVec iteration preserves insertion order; construction still copies input_ids and output_ids in the same order.
isomorphism_proof.tie_breaking_unchanged: Yes. No comparisons or tie-breaking were changed.
isomorphism_proof.floating_point: N/A. Storage type for tracer ids only; no numeric evaluation or shape dtype logic changed.
isomorphism_proof.rng_seeds: N/A. Trace construction has no RNG path.
